Metadata.title: Planifactor - AI production scheduling
Metadata.description: AI-powered production scheduling with Gantt charts, resource optimization, and real-time planning for manufacturers.

Hero.headline: AI Finds Your Optimal Production Schedule
Hero.subtext: For manufacturers who need to ship on time, every time. Planifactor uses artificial intelligence to automatically optimize your production planning.
Hero.ganttAlt: Gantt chart showing optimized production schedule

Features.title: Everything You Need to Optimize Production
Features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for manufacturing teams

aiScheduling.title: AI-Powered Scheduling
aiScheduling.description: Let artificial intelligence find the optimal production sequence. Reduce setup times, eliminate bottlenecks, and maximize throughput automatically.

ganttVisualization.title: Gantt Chart Visualization
ganttVisualization.description: See your entire production timeline at a glance. Drag-and-drop scheduling with real-time conflict detection and resource allocation.

resourceManagement.title: Resource Management
resourceManagement.description: Track machines, workers, and workstations in one place. Manage shifts, breaks, and changeovers with full visibility.

optimization.title: Smart Optimization
optimization.description: Configure optimization goals — minimize late orders, reduce changeover time, or balance workload across resources.

realTimePlanning.title: Real-Time Planning
realTimePlanning.description: Respond to disruptions instantly. Reschedule orders, adjust priorities, and see the impact of changes before committing.

0.quote: Planifactor reduced our scheduling time from 4 hours to 30 minutes. The AI optimizer finds solutions our planners never considered.
0.name: Stefan Petrov
0.title: Production Manager

1.quote: We finally have full visibility into our production timeline. Late deliveries dropped by 40% in the first quarter.
1.name: Maria Georgieva
1.title: Operations Director

2.quote: The Gantt chart alone was worth it — but the AI scheduling is what truly transformed how we plan production.
2.name: Andreas Muller
2.title: Plant Manager

CTABanner.heading: Ready to Optimize Your Production?
CTABanner.description: See how Planifactor can reduce scheduling time, eliminate bottlenecks, and help you deliver on time — every time.
